description:
Epic created from issue github:aronasorman/sling#28

URL: https://github.com/aronasorman/sling/issues/28

## Overview

`sling start` currently requires a GitHub issue ref or Linear ID. This feature adds support for plain text descriptions — when you don't have a ticket yet, just describe what you want and Opus turns it into a structured spec.

```
sling start "add rate limiting to the API endpoints"
```

## Detection Logic

In `issue/source.go`, add a `DescriptionSource` that matches when input does not look like a known ref:
- No `http://` or `https://`
- No `#` character  
- No `LIN-` prefix
- Longer than ~10 chars (avoid accidental matches on typos)

Order of detection: GitHub → Linear → Description (fallback).

## Spec Agent

Spawn an Opus agent in `internal/pipeline/specgen.go` with this system prompt:

```
You are Sling's Spec agent. Turn a raw feature description into a structured engineering spec.

Output a JSON file to the path provided. Schema:
{
  "title": "short imperative title (max 60 chars)",
  "description": "1-2 paragraph explanation of what and why",
  "implementation_notes": "key technical decisions, constraints, patterns to follow",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["list of testable conditions"]
}

Rules:
- Write JSON to the output file. Do not print to stdout.
- Be concrete and implementation-focused.
- Acceptance criteria must be testable (no vague "works correctly").
```

Output path: `/tmp/sling-spec-\<timestamp\>.json`

## Integration

1. `internal/issue/description.go` — `DescriptionSource` that stores the raw input
2. `internal/pipeline/specgen.go` — `RunSpecAgent(desc, repoRoot, contextFiles) (*Issue, error)` — spawns Opus, reads JSON output, returns `*issue.Issue`  
3. `internal/pipeline/intake.go` — before creating the epic bead, if source is `DescriptionSource`, call `RunSpecAgent` first and use its output as the issue

The spec agent output maps directly to `issue.Issue`: title → Title, description + implementation_notes → Body, acceptance_criteria appended to Body.

## Code changes

- `internal/issue/description.go` (new) — `DescriptionSource` implementing `IssueSource`
- `internal/pipeline/specgen.go` (new) — `RunSpecAgent`
- `internal/pipeline/intake.go` — call specgen when source is description
- `internal/agent/agent.go` — add `SpecAgentSystemPrompt(outputPath string)`
- `internal/issue/source.go` — register `DescriptionSource` as fallback in `DetectSource`

## Acceptance criteria

- `sling start "add rate limiting to the API endpoints"` runs without error
- Opus produces a spec with title, description, implementation_notes, acceptance_criteria
- Epic bead is created with the full spec as body
- Planner can read the bead and decompose it into child beads
- `sling start gh#42` still works (regression)
- `sling start LIN-100` still works (regression)
title: feat: plain text description intake with Opus spec agent
